11 // Interface du service

27 
28 using namespace Arcane;

30 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
31 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
32 
33 class IXM3PostProcessorService
34  : public ArcaneIXM3PostProcessorObject
35 {
36 public:
37 
39  IXM3PostProcessorService(const Arcane::ServiceBuildInfo & sbi)
40  : ArcaneIXM3PostProcessorObject(sbi), m_data_writer(NULL), m_is_master(true) {}
41 
43  ~IXM3PostProcessorService() {}
44 
45 public:
46 
48  void build();
49 
50 
51  public:
52 
56  IDataWriter* dataWriter() {return m_data_writer;}
57 
62  void setBaseDirectoryName(const String& dirname);
63 
65  const String& baseDirectoryName() {return PostProcessorWriterBase::baseDirectoryName();}
66 
70  void setBaseFileName(const String& filename) override {PostProcessorWriterBase::setBaseFileName(filename);}
71 
73  const String& baseFileName() override {return PostProcessorWriterBase::baseFileName();}
74 
76  void setMesh(IMesh * mesh) override {m_mesh = mesh; m_mesh_set = true;}
77 
79  void setTimes(RealConstArrayView times) override;
80 
82  RealConstArrayView times() override {return PostProcessorWriterBase::times();}
83 
85  void setVariables(VariableCollection variables) override;
86 
87 
89  VariableCollection variables() override {return PostProcessorWriterBase::variables();}
90 
92  void setGroups(ItemGroupCollection groups) override;
93 
95  ItemGroupCollection groups() override {return PostProcessorWriterBase::groups();}
96 
97  public:
98 
100  void notifyBeginWrite() override;
101 
103  void notifyEndWrite() override;
104 
105  public:
106 
108  void close() override {}
109 
110  private:
111  IDataWriter* m_data_writer;
112  IMesh* m_mesh;
113  Integer m_event_number;
114  bool m_is_master;
115  bool m_events_initialized;
116  bool m_variables_set;
117  bool m_groups_set;
118  bool m_times_set;
119  bool m_directory_name_set;
120  bool m_mesh_set;
121  bool m_is_ready;
122  SharedArray<IVariable*> m_extracted_variables;
123 
124 };
125 
126 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
127 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
128 
129 void
130 IXM3PostProcessorService::
131 build()
132 {
133  // build PostProcessorWriterBase
134  PostProcessorWriterBase::build();
135 
136  // initial settings to be done
137  m_events_initialized = false;
138  m_variables_set = false;
139  m_groups_set = false;
140  m_times_set = false;
141  m_directory_name_set = false;
142  m_mesh_set = false;
143  m_is_ready = false;
144 
145  // Initialize event number
146  m_event_number = 1;
147 
148  // Event global file does not exist
149  m_events_initialized = false;
150 }
151 
152 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
153 
154 void
155 IXM3PostProcessorService::
156 setTimes(RealConstArrayView times)
157 {
158  PostProcessorWriterBase::setTimes(times);
159  m_times_set = true;
160 }
161 
162 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
163 
164 void
165 IXM3PostProcessorService::
166 setBaseDirectoryName(const String& dirname)
167 {
168  PostProcessorWriterBase::setBaseDirectoryName(dirname);
169  m_directory_name_set = true;
170 }
171 
172 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
173 void
174 IXM3PostProcessorService::
175 setVariables(VariableCollection variables)
176 {
177  // Temporary handling of array mesh variable (before their handling within mesh xsd)
178  // Create scalar mesh variable with each component of array variables.
179  VariableCollection internal_variables;
180  for (VariableCollection::Enumerator var_enum = variables.enumerator(); ++var_enum;)
181  {
182  if ((*var_enum)->dimension() == 2)
183  {
184  // Extract the components
185  m_extracted_variables = ArcGeoSim::VariableUtils::extractArrayComponents(*var_enum);
186  for (Integer i = 0; i< m_extracted_variables.size(); ++i) internal_variables.add(m_extracted_variables[i]);
187  }
188  else internal_variables.add(*var_enum);
189  }
190  PostProcessorWriterBase::setVariables(internal_variables);
191  m_variables_set = true;
192 }
193 
194 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
195 
196 void
197 IXM3PostProcessorService::
198 setGroups(ItemGroupCollection groups)
199 {
200  PostProcessorWriterBase::setGroups(groups);
201  m_groups_set = true;
202 }
203 
204 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
205 
206 void
207 IXM3PostProcessorService::
208 notifyBeginWrite()
209 {
210  // Check if mesh set, otherwise set default mesh
211  if (! m_mesh_set) m_mesh = mesh();
212 
213  // Check if Post Pro ready
214  m_is_ready = (m_groups_set && m_variables_set && m_times_set && m_directory_name_set);
215  if (! m_is_ready)
216  fatal()<< "Post processor settings incomplete. Must set mesh, groups, variables, times and directory name. Exiting";
217 
218  // Build data writer. How to couple it with PostProcessorWriterBase?
219  m_data_writer = new IXM3DataWriter(this, m_mesh, m_event_number, m_events_initialized, options()->useFaceAid());
220 }
221 
222 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
223 
224 void
225 IXM3PostProcessorService::
226 notifyEndWrite()
227 {
228  // Increment event_number
229  ++m_event_number;
230 
231  // Event global file is created
232  m_events_initialized = true;
233 
234  // Delete data writer ;
235  delete m_data_writer;
236  // Delete temporary variables coming from mesh array extraction
237  for (SharedArray<IVariable*>::iterator ivariable = m_extracted_variables.begin(); ivariable != m_extracted_variables.end(); ++ivariable)
238  {
239  // delete temporary variable
240  ArcGeoSim::VariableUtils::deleteUnreferencedVariable(*ivariable, traceMng());
241  }
242  m_extracted_variables.clear();
243 }
244 
245 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
246 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
247 
248 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_IXM3POSTPROCESSOR(IXM3PostProcessor,IXM3PostProcessorService);
249 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_IXM3POSTPROCESSOR(IfpPostProcessorV3,IXM3PostProcessorService); // alias de compatibilit�
250 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_IXM3POSTPROCESSOR(IfpPostProcessorNew,IXM3PostProcessorService); // alias de compatibilit�
